passed_checks.check_name: Ensure the last USER is not root
Ensure that APT isn't used
code_block:
# backend/Dockerfile
FROM python:3.11-slim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy requirements
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install system dependencies for python-magic
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    libmagic1 \
    iptables \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install dependencies
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt --default-timeout=600 --retries=10

# Copy backend code
COPY . .

# Copy the firewall script into the container
COPY scripts/setup-firewall.sh /usr/local/bin/setup-firewall.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/setup-firewall.sh

# Expose backend port
EXPOSE 8000

RUN addgroup --system appgroup && \
    adduser --system --ingroup appgroup appuser

RUN chown -R appuser:appgroup /app

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=20s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1

USER appuser

# Run the backend server
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure that HEALTHCHECK instructions have been added to container images
Ensure that a user for the container has been created
Ensure the last USER is not root
Ensure that APT isn't used
code_block:
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files first
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies INSIDE the container (Linux binaries)
# Delete any existing node_modules from Windows first
RUN rm -rf node_modules && npm install

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Remove node_modules again in case COPY brought Windows ones
RUN rm -rf node_modules && npm install

# Add non-root user
RUN addgroup -S appgroup && adduser -S appuser -G appgroup
RUN chown -R appuser:appgroup /app
USER appuser

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=30s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000 || exit 1

CMD ["npm", "run", "preview", "--", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "3000"]
